color_story: Cool cerulean (210°) as the neutral spine, ranging from nearly-white backgrounds (L:97%) through body text (L:22%), held consistently restrained (S:8–9%) for sophistication. Sage green (120°) as the sole accent, intentionally desaturated (S:23%) to signal craft without aggression. Hues fall safely within mandate windows (210° in 188–352°; 120° in 112–128°), avoiding all forbidden zones. High-key luminosity throughout—page background near-white, hero gradient asymmetrically brightened (waxing gibbous 76% at 58%/40% center)—honors spring's 13.5 daylight hours and the brief's 'lit from within' philosophy.
